src: Simba is a program used to repeat certain (complicated) tasks. Typically these tasks involve using the mouse and keyboard. Simba is programmable, which means you can design your own logic and steps that Simba will follow, based upon certain input such as colors on the screen.
ja: Simbaはマウスとキーボードを使った複雑な操作を自動化するプログラムです。プログラム可能で、画面上の色などの入力に基づいた独自のロジックと手順を設計できます。
